Journal.Title: Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Endocrinology and Diabetology, University Obesity Centre, University Hospital Hamburg-Eppendorf, Hamburg, Germany.
Department of Endocrinology and Diabetology, University Obesity Centre, University Hospital Hamburg-Eppendorf, Hamburg, Germany.
Department of Internal Medicine 1, Endocrinology and Diabetology, University Hospital Schleswig-Holstein, Lübeck Campus, Lübeck, Germany.
Department of Nutritional Medicine, University Hospital Leipzig, Leipzig, Germany.
Department of Endocrinology and Nephrology, University of Leipzig, Leipzig, Germany.
Department of Human Nutrition, German Institute of Human Nutrition Potsdam-Rehbrücke, Nuthetal, Germany.
Department of Endocrinology and Metabolic Medicine (incl. Department of Lipid Metabolism), Charité University Medicine Berlin, Berlin, Germany.
Helmholtz Institute for Metabolism, Obesity and Vascular Research (HI-MAG), Helmholtz Zentrum München at Leipzig University and Leipzig University Hospital AöR, Leipzig, Germany.
Department of Endocrinology and Nephrology, University of Leipzig, Leipzig, Germany.
Department of Gastroenterology, Hepatology and Endocrinology, Hannover Medical School (MHH), Hannover, Germany.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: J. Aberle declares receiving fees for scientific cooperation, lecturing and consultant activities from Amgen, Astra Zeneca, Boehringer Ingelheim, Lilly Deutschland and Novo Nordisk. A. Lautenbach declares that she has received support for travel expenses and fees for lecturing and consultant activities from Lilly Deutschland, Novo Nordisk, Astra Zeneca and Oviva Direkt. S. Meyhöfer declares that she has received support for travel expenses and fees for lecturing and consultant activities from Amgen, Biomarin, Lilly Deutschland, Novo Nordisk and Sanofi. C. Terkamp declares that he has received support for travel expenses and fees for lecturing and consultant activities from Astra Zeneca, Bohringer Ingelheim, Ipsen, Lilly Deutschland, Novo Nordisk, Pfizer and Sandoz. L. Selig declares that he has received fees for lecturing activities from Lilly Germany, Nestlé, Danone and Baxter. K. Mai declares that he has received fees for lecturing and consultant activities from Astra Zeneca, Boehringer Ingelheim, Lilly Deutschland, Ipsen and Novo Nordisk. M. Blüher declares that he has received fees for lecturing and consultant activities from Abbott, Amgen, Astra Zeneca, Bayer, Boehringer Ingelheim, Daiichi-Sankyo, Lilly, MSD, Novo Nordisk and Sanofi.
